description: Create a 'Dynamic Metal Stamping' process in OpenLCA that adjusts material efficiency based on a parameter, using the USLCI database imported from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip. The process must produce 1 kg of 'Stamped Part' and include a local parameter 'scrap_rate' (default 0.2). Configure the Steel input flow with the formula '1 / (1 - scrap_rate)' and the Steel Scrap output flow with 'scrap_rate / (1 - scrap_rate)'. Generate a product system and export the calculation results to ~/LCA_Results/yield_result_20.csv using the default scrap_rate, and to ~/LCA_Results/yield_result_10.csv after updating the scrap_rate to 0.1.
